headlines.headline: Crevex Labs sees mixed results in process automation pilot program

sentiment.reasoning: Mixed results from a pilot program suggest uncertainty regarding future operational improvements or product viability, leading to a neutral to slightly negative short-term outlook and continued uncertainty long-term.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
